title: Guest Feedback Request Email Template for Hotels in Egypt
body_template:
Dear {{guest_name}},

We hope you enjoyed your stay at {{hotel_name}}. Your feedback is crucial in helping us maintain the highest standards of service. Please take a moment to share your experience with us.

Click the link below to leave your review:

Share Your Feedback

Thank you for your time and we look forward to welcoming you back to {{hotel_name}} in the future.

Warm regards,
{{sender_name}}
{{hotel_name}} Team

variables.name: review_link
variables.description: URL link to the review page

variables.name: sender_name
variables.description: Name of the person sending the email
